lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage, including large dents and visible rust. The interior is heavily worn and requires extensive cleaning or repair. Mechanically, the vehicle has major issues and is not currently in reliable working order.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and several dents. The interior is heavily worn with visible damage to the upholstery. The engine and transmission require mechanical repairs.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, appearing and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like shine and absolutely no chips, scratches, or dents. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and every electronic feature and accessory functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is impeccable, having been meticulously maintained with a complete service history and no outstanding maintenance requirements. It has been garage-kept its entire life and professionally detailed regularly. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a vehicle in showroom-perfect condition.
Mint condition.

Roll up your sleeves and get ready for a rewarding project! This vehicle is the perfect 'mechanic's special' for someone looking to restore a classic or use it for parts. It definitely needs significant mechanical and cosmetic work, but it's offered at a price that leaves plenty of room in your budget for repairs!

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, appearing and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior is flawless, with a deep, mirror-like finish on the original paint and no chips, scratches, or dings to be found. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the leather upholstery shows zero wear, and every electronic feature and accessory functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is impeccable, backed by a complete service history and very low mileage. It offers a smooth, quiet ride and needs absolutely nothing. This is a rare find for a collector or anyone seeking a vehicle in showroom-quality state.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and value. Meticulously inspected to ensure long-term reliability, this unit stands as a testament to disciplined ownership and remains in prime operational order.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride and it’s looking for a wonderful new home. It’s been super reliable and is in really solid shape—perfect for your daily commutes or fun weekend getaways! It runs smoothly and has been well-loved and cared for. Come take it for a spin, I just know you’re going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving powerplant is mated to a crisp 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement, ensuring structural integrity under high lateral loads. The suspension retains its factory-tuned balance with updated bushings, providing precise turn-in and communicative steering feedback. While showing minor patina consistent with dedicated enthusiast use, the mechanical vitals remain robust, making this an ideal driver’s car for those who prioritize analog engagement and chassis dynamics.
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained interior. Recent service completed. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and represents a fantastic balance of performance and reliability. The exterior paint retains a high-gloss finish with only minor stone chips typical of careful road use, while the body panels remain straight and true. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the upholstery is supple with minimal bolster wear, and all interior electronics—from the infotainment system to the seat heaters—are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, benefiting from a documented service history that ensures a smooth, quiet idle and crisp gear shifts. It drives with the confidence of a well-cared-for machine, making it an ideal choice for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality pre-owned vehicle that is ready for the road.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies dependable performance and refined aesthetics. This unit has undergone a comprehensive mechanical evaluation to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for daily operation and long-term reliability. The exterior maintains a commendable presence, while the interior offers a clean, well-preserved environment for both driver and passengers. A premier choice for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of value and proven quality.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious balance of performance and reliability. This specimen has undergone a thorough assessment to ensure its mechanical integrity and aesthetic presence meet our exacting standards. An ideal acquisition for the discerning driver, this automobile offers a refined experience and remains in commendable condition, representing a premier opportunity in its class.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride, and it’s been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a reliable car that still looks great on the road. Everything runs smoothly, and it’s totally ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see this go to a great new home.

Available is a mechanically sound E92 M3 featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8. This high-revving power plant delivers linear power delivery up to its 8,400 RPM redline. The chassis remains taut with a well-maintained multi-link rear suspension and M-tuned dampers. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service, ensuring the high-pressure VANOS system operates within factory spec. Power is sent through a precise 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential. The exterior and interior reflect careful ownership, showing only minor signs of use consistent with its age. A driver-focused machine optimized for lateral Gs and auditory bliss.
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance records included. Minor exterior scratches. Interior is well-kept. Reliable performance.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-maintained, reliable driver. The exterior retains a beautiful gloss, with only minor cosmetic stone chips consistent with careful use, and the body panels are straight and true. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and odor-free; the upholstery shows minimal wear, and every electronic feature—from the premium audio system to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection, confirming that the brakes and tires have significant life remaining. It drives straight, quiet, and offers a refined experience on both city streets and highways. This is a turn-key vehicle that balances high-end quality with practical value.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent care and reliable performance. This model offers a sophisticated driving experience, featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust mechanical profile. It represents an exceptional value for the discerning driver seeking a balance of luxury and dependability. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this vehicle stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership.

This vehicle represents a distinguished acquisition for the discerning motorist. Maintained to rigorous standards, it exhibits robust mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, ensuring both reliability and a commanding presence on the road. A premier choice for those seeking quality without compromise.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-cared for over the years! Perfect for daily commutes or fun weekend road trips, it runs smoothly and is totally ready for its next owner. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

Offered is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure VANOS. This driver-focused example has been properly sorted, with documented rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement already completed. The factory 6-speed Getrag manual transmission provides crisp, tactile engagement, paired with a variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. The chassis is bolstered by a refreshed suspension setup, ensuring the longitudinal and lateral dynamics remain sharp. While showing light patina consistent with an enthusiast-driven life, the drivetrain remains robust and the throttle response is telepathic. A turn-key performance icon ready for the canyons.
Used car. Good condition. Reliable runner. Minor wear. Clean title.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and everyday utility. The exterior features a lustrous finish with only minor, negligible signs of road use, while the body remains straight and the alloy wheels are in excellent shape. Inside, you’ll find a clean, smoke-free cabin with well-preserved upholstery and a fully operational suite of technology and climate controls. Mechanically sound and consistently serviced, this car delivers a smooth, quiet ride and confident acceleration. It is a reliable, turn-key example that has been treated with care, making it an ideal choice for a buyer seeking a high-quality pre-owned experience.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a balance of performance and value. This unit has been thoroughly vetted to ensure structural integrity and mechanical reliability. With its refined aesthetic and consistent service history, this vehicle stands as a robust acquisition that exceeds standard expectations for its class.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that aligns with our dealership’s standards of excellence. Each component has been vetted to ensure sustained performance and reliability for its next owner.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that’s been super well-cared for? This beauty is ready for its next adventure! It’s in great shape, runs like a dream, and has plenty of life left in it. I’ve absolutely loved driving this car, but it’s time to pass it on to someone who will enjoy it just as much as I have. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it feels on the road!

Offered is a mechanically robust E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 inline-six power plant, equipped with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure VANOS. This chassis has been proactively maintained with documented rear subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension setup utilizing Bilstein coilovers for optimized rebound and compression. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission offers crisp engagement, transferring power through a factory limited-slip differential. While the exterior displays honest patina, the mechanical vitals are exceptional, including recent valve lash adjustments and rod bearing service to ensure peak performance at the 8,000 RPM redline. A driver-focused example built for technical precision.
Well-maintained vehicle. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Ready for daily use.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish with only minor road-wear consistent with careful driving. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the leather upholstery remains supple, and all electronic features—including the premium sound system and dual-zone climate control—function flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is sound, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule. It drives straight, shifts smoothly, and offers a quiet, composed ride. Recent service includes a fresh oil change and a multi-point inspection, ensuring it’s ready for its next owner without any immediate needs. A reliable, handsome example that truly shows pride of previous ownership.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, representing a superior balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance and long-term reliability. A distinguished acquisition for the discerning driver who demands both sophistication and proven value.
